A tragic fire in Queens claimed the lives of four individuals, including a 3-year-old girl, while severe storms caused widespread damage and travel disruptions across New York and New Jersey, highlighting ongoing safety and infrastructure challenges in the region.

### Risks & Alerts

- 3-year-old girl among 4 dead from fire in illegally subdivided Queens apartment building. [↗](https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxNV2JxbHVTRnlHRTdhUVlPRGRLeDg3djNFR1JXSXJlQzNjd1Z5M05Oa2JRbk93ajRjUE1oOEdKcWFNb2hEc0hIdXp2MmhTN3FQdVFDVWsxUXRGZ0NXa3pPUXp6R2U4cEVJWEI4T1RkRDBhbFpwRGZ4Vzh6cF9PME1pSmF0c1pORUhTOEJHNklvLUpkQTI2TUNpckFDWktMcDhsOU9zb1psX2kzY0JXbUNnYUxGUHdHQ2Vu?oc=5)
- Severe storms hit New York and New Jersey, downing trees and causing power outages in some areas. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- High winds caused travel issues and forced MTA to restrict vehicles on Staten Island bridge. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Driver killed while avoiding downed tree amid windswept downpours causing travel issues in NYC area. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)

### Civics & Politics

- Foie gras is (almost) officially banned in NYC following recent legislation. - Brooklyn residents advocate for the preservation of the historic wood bridge for pedestrians and cyclists only. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Staten Island politicians demand answers regarding NYC's blizzard response and plowing delays. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
- Mamdani is urged to help loosen NY rent laws to make vacant affordable units available.
